54915.title: The Situation Room with Wolf Blitzer
54915.description: Anchor Wolf Blitzer invites CNN correspondents, analysts and guests for timely coverage of the day's news events. Patterned after the concept of the White House Situation Room, the Monday-Saturday show is a discussion forum often with opposing sides debating current national affairs.

54916.title: Erin Burnett OutFront
54916.description: It's Erin Burnett's turn to step out front and try to maintain a viable viewer presence for CNN in the weekday news arena. But the former CNBC anchor won't worry about ratings for her hourlong general news program, comparing that burden to "death." Instead, she'll concern herself with translating world events into relevant information for viewers, paying close attention to such topics as the Middle East and women's issues. "I want people to say that our show is smart. I want our show to be authentic", Burnett says in a promo. "I want our show to have courage". Left unsaid, of course, is that she wants her show to have a big audience, too.

54917.title: Anderson Cooper 360
54917.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

54918.title: Cuomo Prime Time
54918.description: After airing several different programs in this time slot in recent years, CNN attempts to solidify its prime-time schedule by moving Chris Cuomo to the toughest hour in cable news. Cuomo, the former co-anchor of CNN's morning show `New Day', eschews panel discussions in favour of in-depth one-on-one interviews that test politicians and newsmakers on their positions. He also analyses the news of the day and presents breaking news. Described by one publication as "America's toughest news anchor", Cuomo wants his show to be known as one that holds civil debates. "The need is clear", he says. "Hopefully we help fill it".

54919.title: Don Lemon Tonight
54919.description: Don Lemon presents the biggest stories, newsmakers, and spirited conversations of the day.

54920.title: Anderson Cooper 360
54920.description: Cooper brings his prickly but often witty perspective to current events and personalities in the news. He is joined by a series of guests that frequently include political and legal analysts.

54921.title: CNN Newsroom with Michael Holmes
54921.description: Live from Atlanta, Michael Holmes presents the latest news and global events.

54922.description: Offering unique insights into African market's latest information while observing the events and developments that impact the business world.

54923.title: Inside Africa
54923.description: Reports on African political and social issues from host Isha Sesay and correspondents across the continent.

54924.title: Africa Avant Garde
54924.description: We hear from some of the continent's most experimental contemporary artists, including acclaimed Nigerian visual artist Victor Ehikhamenor.

54925.title: Connecting Africa
54925.description: From the CEO of a massive energy company in South Africa and fruit exporters in Egypt to the man who bought a bank in Nigeria, we look at all aspects of doing business in Africa.

54927.title: Marketplace Africa
54927.description: A look at the economy and industry surrounding textiles in Kenya and highlighting Laureen Kouassi-Olsson, a seasoned executive in the African financial services and private equity industries.

54935.title: Smerconish
54935.description: After serving as an MSNBC contributor and guest-host on the network for four years, TV and radio personality Michael Smerconish believed he was ready to head a show of his own. CNN agreed, and thus was born `Smerconish', an hourlong Saturday morning program that takes after its host's independent views. Using a topical, conversational format, he aims for the TV show to be an extension of his weekday radio broadcast, with free-flowing topics and the ability to discuss issues that strike a chord with the audience. Along the same lines, he thinks it's important to present the content in an engaging manner, free of my-way-or-the-highway ideology. Smerconish, who has a law degree from the University of Pennsylvania, is also a New York Times' best-selling author.
